category_sources: source_facts.description says dnstracer traces a chain of DNS servers to the source.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official mavetju.org project page use dnstracer.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and best available documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, and official mavetju.org project/download pages expose release archives rather than an official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies DNS server-chain tracing; source_facts.executables lists the dnstracer CLI.
